events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: skipping the post-repair insulation resistance test on an HV system is a critical safety failure — it bypasses the mandatory OEM/NFPA 70E-adjacent verification gate before re-energization, risking undetected insulation breakdown, shock, and arc-flash hazards. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: critical`, with corrective actions requiring IR testing and documentation before close-out.
